final_verdict.summary: These commands suffer from enterprise-grade over-engineering with startup-level execution. They promise AI-powered intelligence but deliver configuration file complexity.
final_verdict.key_insight: Complexity score violations are not signs of sophistication - they're technical debt in designer clothing.
final_verdict.call_to_action: SIMPLIFY OR PERISH. Your future self will thank you for choosing boring, working code over impressive, broken abstractions.
final_verdict.confidence_interval: 95% confidence that simplification will improve all metrics
